name: neural-necropolis
description: Neural Necropolis — Where Dead Code Dreams of Vengeance. AI agents explore, fight, loot, and escape a procedurally generated dungeon.

scripts.dev:duel: concurrently -k -n engine,b1,b2,b3,b4,e1,e2,e3,t1,t2,t3 -c blue,red,red,red,red,green,green,green,yellow,yellow,yellow "cross-env BEAT_PLANNING_MS=3000 BEAT_ACTION_MS=500 npm run engine" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=B1 tsx watch src/agents/bots/berserker.ts" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=B2 tsx watch src/agents/bots/berserker.ts" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=B3 tsx watch src/agents/bots/berserker.ts" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=B4 tsx watch src/agents/bots/berserker.ts" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=E1 tsx watch src/agents/bots/explorer.ts" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=E2 tsx watch src/agents/bots/explorer.ts" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=E3 tsx watch src/agents/bots/explorer.ts" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=T1 tsx watch src/agents/bots/treasure-hunter.ts" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=T2 tsx watch src/agents/bots/treasure-hunter.ts" "cross-env BOT_SLOT=T3 tsx watch src/agents/bots/treasure-hunter.ts"
scripts.dev:duel:aibot: concurrently -k -n engine,ai1,ai2,ai3,ai4,ai5,ai6,ai7,ai8,ai9,ai10 -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,green,red,white,blue,magenta,cyan,yellow "cross-env BEAT_PLANNING_MS=8000 BEAT_ACTION_MS=500 npm run engine" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=A tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=B tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=C tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=D tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=E tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=F tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=G tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=H tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=I tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts" "cross-env AIBOT_SLOT=J tsx watch src/agents/bots/aibot.ts"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n engine,runner,berserker,treasure,explorer,aibot -c blue,white,red,yellow,green,magenta "npm run engine" "npm run dev:runner" "npm run dev:bot:berserker" "npm run dev:bot:treasure" "npm run dev:bot:explorer" "npm run dev:bot:aibot"
